title: Durga Puja Holiday Notice — 9th to 14th October 2024
body:
This is to inform all students, parents, and staff that the school will remain closed from 9th October (Shashti) to 13th October 2024 (Dashami) on account of Durga Puja, the most celebrated festival of West Bengal.

A pre-puja cultural programme — including dhunuchi naach, traditional dance, and group singing — will be held on 8th October 2024 at the school auditorium at 10:00 AM. All students and parents are cordially invited.

Classes will resume normally on 14th October 2024 (Bijaya Dashami). All staff are required to report on 14th October.

title: Saraswati Puja 2025 — Arrangements and Holiday Notice
body:
This is to inform all students, parents, and staff about the arrangements for Saraswati Puja 2025:

• Pushpanjali Ceremony: 3rd February 2025 (Monday) at 8:30 AM
• Dress Code: Students may come in traditional Bengali attire (white and yellow saree for girls; panjabi and dhoti for boys). School uniform is optional for this day.
• Cultural Evening Programme: 3rd February at 5:00 PM
• Holiday: 4th February 2025 (Tuesday)

All students are requested to be present by 8:00 AM on 3rd February for the ceremonial set-up. Parents are warmly invited to the evening cultural programme.

title: Annual Examination Schedule – Classes I to IX
body:
The Annual Examination for Classes I to IX is scheduled to commence from 15th September 2024. The detailed timetable for each class is attached herewith. Students are advised to collect their Admit Cards from their class teachers by 10th September 2024.

Regular attendance in classes until the examination date is mandatory. Parents are requested to ensure their ward's full preparation. For any queries, please contact the Academic Office at our Newtown, Kolkata campus.

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting — Term I (3rd August 2024)
body:
The first Parent-Teacher Meeting for the academic year 2024–25 is scheduled for 3rd August 2024 (Saturday) from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM at the Sajj Global School campus, Newtown, Kolkata.

Parents of all classes from Nursery to Class XII are requested to attend. The purpose of this meeting is to discuss mid-term academic progress, share term calendars, and address any concerns. Prior registration via the school mobile app is recommended to ensure a timely slot.

For parents unable to attend in person, video call appointments may be arranged — please contact your ward's class teacher in advance.

title: Revised School Timings — Summer Schedule (Effective 23rd May)
body:
In view of the summer heat in Kolkata, school timings for all classes (Nursery to XII) will be revised effective 23rd May 2024 until further notice:

• School starts: 7:30 AM
• School ends: 1:00 PM

Bus timings will be adjusted accordingly and communicated separately via the school app. Students are strongly advised to carry adequate water, wear comfortable light-coloured clothing, and use sunscreen if travelling to school independently.

Parents are requested to ensure children have a nutritious breakfast before school during this period.

title: Annual Sports Day — Dress Code and Schedule (20th July 2024)
body:
Annual Sports Day is scheduled for 20th July 2024 at the Sajj Global School campus grounds. All students must wear their House colour sports uniform.

Doors open at 7:30 AM. March past and opening ceremony begins at 8:15 AM sharp. Field events run until 2:00 PM, followed by prize distribution.

Parents are cordially invited. Reserved seating is available for elderly and differently-abled visitors. Please carry your school-issued parent ID card for entry. Outside food is not permitted; the school cafeteria will be open throughout the day.

title: Netaji's Birthday — School Programme on 23rd January 2025
body:
To commemorate the 128th birth anniversary of Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose — one of Bengal's greatest sons and India's most revered freedom fighter — Sajj Global School will hold a special morning assembly programme on 23rd January 2025.

The programme will include:
• Patriotic songs by the school choir
• A short play on Netaji's life by Class VIII
• An essay reading competition (selected entries from Class V–X)
• Address by the Principal

All students are required to attend in full school uniform. The programme will be held at 8:30 AM in the school auditorium.

title: Admission Notice: Class XI 2025–26 (Newtown Campus)
body:
Applications for admission to Class XI (Science, Commerce, Humanities) for the academic year 2025–26 are now invited at Sajj Global School, Newtown, Kolkata.

Eligibility: Minimum 75% aggregate in Class X CBSE board examinations.

Last date for application: 10th May 2025. Admission will be granted based on Class X marks and a subject counselling interaction. Students from other CBSE schools in Kolkata and West Bengal are welcome to apply.

For more details and to submit the application form, visit the Admissions page on this website or contact the Admissions Office at Action Area IID, Newtown, Kolkata – 700 156.
